title: Sovereign Enterprise RSI Operating System
thesis: A large specialist-agent institution can coordinate work, proof, review, treasury, rollback, and memory through an evidence-governed RSI operating system.
problem: Enterprises cannot safely adopt autonomous work unless responsibility, evaluation, rollback, settlement, and evidence are explicit.
mission: Build an operating theater of specialist agent cells whose work is routed, reviewed, settled, and chronicled.
why: This is the organizational layer that turns proof cards into an operating system.
rsi: An enterprise artifact is not upgraded because it performs once. It earns scoped upgrade rights only after proof, evaluation, review, monitoring, and rollback readiness.
agialpha: AGIALPHA coordinates mission budgets, agent claims, proof bonds, reviewer bonds, credentials, reputation, reward settlement, and treasury routing across the operating system.
